betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Introduction to HBM's Nuclear Tech§f

§aBegin your journey into the world of nuclear technology, advanced machinery, and explosive firepower!§f

HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod is one of the largest content mods for Minecraft 1.12.2, adding over a decade's worth of content. From basic blacksmithing to thermonuclear weapons, oil refinement to particle accelerators, this mod transforms your world.

§6Getting Started§f:
Before you dive into the tech tree, gather large quantities of §biron§f, §bcopper§f, §bredstone§f, and §bfuel§f. Explore the world for structures like §bAntennas§f, §bRadio Stations§f, and §bFactories§f — they contain valuable early-game resources like steel, circuits, and diesel.

§cWarning§f: Some structures are highly dangerous! §bNuclear Power Plants§f and §bSellafield§f craters emit lethal radiation. Avoid them until you have proper protection.

§6Progression Roadmap§f:
§b• Stage 1 - Blacksmithing§f: Anvils, presses, stamps, and blast furnaces
§b• Stage 2 - The Factory§f: Assembly machines, generators, conveyor belts
§b• Stage 3 - Electrical Age§f: Soldering stations, circuits, chemical plants
§b• Stage 4 - Oil & Power§f: Refineries, steam turbines, solar power
§b• Stage 5 - The Foundry§f: Crucibles, alloys, high-speed steel
§b• Stage 6 - Nuclear Age§f: Reactors, centrifuges, radioactive materials

§eTip§f: Use JEI (press R on items) to view all recipes. HBM has thousands of recipes — memorizing them all is impossible without it!
